## If this adds/changes a profile in profiles/

- [ ] I actually ran Distill mode on this person — this isn't a mockup or hand-written approximation
- [ ] Every source listed is real and I checked the link works
- [ ] No direct quote exceeds 15 words, and no source is quoted more than once
- [ ] The Confidence note honestly reflects any thin or contested material — I didn't pad it

## If this changes SKILL.md

- [ ] This doesn't loosen any guardrail in the Core principle section
- [ ] I explain below *why* this change improves the research/extraction/application process, with a concrete example if possible
